Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint Declaration Of Tate C. Casey In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHELSEA MARTIN A.K.A. CHELSEA CALKINS' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
